title: ModelRuntime trait + capability introspection unit-test suite
goal: Cross-cutting unit tests for the ModelRuntime trait surface: object-safety, Send+Sync, capability declaration round-trip, ModelId v7 monotonicity, error type completeness, and serde compatibility for IPC. Establishes the regression-test floor before adapter implementations land.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/model_runtime_trait_surface_tests.rs with ~12 unit tests; fixture data under tests/fixtures/model_runtime/.
implementation_notes: Tests: (1) object_safety_compile_test — function takes `&dyn ModelRuntime` and `Box<dyn KvCacheOps>`, `Box<dyn LoraStackOps>`, `Box<dyn SteeringHookOps>`; compile success is the test. (2) trait_is_send_sync — `fn _assert_send_sync<T: Send + Sync>() {}; _assert_send_sync::<dyn ModelRuntime>();` (3) model_id_v7_monotonic — mint 1000 ModelIds, assert timestamps non-decreasing per HBR-INT-008. (4) capabilities_serde_round_trip — load capabilities_sample.json, deserialize, re-serialize, assert byte-equal. (5) capabilities_camelcase_for_ipc — verify serialized JSON uses camelCase keys (frontend contract). (6) error_variant_completeness — assert every ModelRuntimeError variant has a Display impl and unique discriminant. (7) lora_descriptor_serde — load lora_descriptor_sample.json, round-trip. (8) lora_strength_clamp — try_new with 3.0 returns Err; try_new with -0.5 returns Err; try_new with 0.5 returns Ok. (9) kv_prefix_handle_tamper — construct two handles with same prefix_id but different content_hash; assert equality returns false (so an adapter rejecting on hash mismatch is correct). (10) steering_vector_provenance_required — register_vector with provenance=Manual{author:"", notes:""} returns Err (empty author rejected). (11) capability_consistency — ModelRegistration with runtime_binding=LlamaCpp + supports_activation_steering=true fails the consistency check. (12) external_compat_short_circuit — register_model_process with provider=ExternalCompat returns None and does NOT write to ledger.
risk_if_missed: Trait surface regressions slip through into adapter implementations; engine-agnostic invariant decays silently.
validator_focus: All 12 tests present and pass; fixtures match real schema; v7 monotonicity covers HBR-INT-008.

minimum_controls: Object-safety compile test cannot be skipped.
camelCase IPC contract test must catch a field renamed to snake_case.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: Cross-cutting trait surface tests cover the full C.1 acceptance floor: object-safety for ModelRuntime + KvCacheOps + LoraStackOps + SteeringHookOps; Send+Sync for trait objects and Arc/Box wrappers; ModelId v7 monotonicity over 1000 mints; ModelCapabilities serde snake_case + IPC camelCase parity; error variant completeness (11 variants, unique discriminants, non-empty Display); LoraDescriptor + LoraStrength validation; KvPrefixHandle tamper detection; SteeringVector provenance enforcement; capability-binding consistency rejection (LlamaCpp+activation_steering); ExternalCompat short-circuit.

integration_validator_review_prior.verdict_reason: Cross-cutting trait surface tests cover the full C.1 acceptance floor: object-safety for ModelRuntime + KvCacheOps + LoraStackOps + SteeringHookOps; Send+Sync for trait objects and Arc/Box wrappers; ModelId v7 monotonicity over 1000 mints; ModelCapabilities serde snake_case + IPC camelCase parity; error variant completeness (11 variants, unique discriminants, non-empty Display); LoraDescriptor + LoraStrength validation; KvPrefixHandle tamper detection; SteeringVector provenance enforcement; capability-binding consistency rejection (LlamaCpp+activation_steering); ExternalCompat short-circuit.
